content.full_text:
Anna G. Eshoo
Member • Board of Supervisors • San Mateo County

20 August 1990

Mr. Scott Hallabrin, Acting General Counsel
Fair Political Practice Commission
428 J Street - Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

I write to you at the advice of Susan Bobrow of your office, to whom I spoke with today.

I need the formal opinion of your office as soon as possible as to the following:

I have been invited to join a delegation of business leaders, as well as local and state elected officials as part of a State Leadership Initiative in October to Poland, Hungary, and Yugoslavia. The trip is related to trade and economics. I have attached everything that was sent to me which describes the delegation, who invited me as well as the itinerary.

I was re-elected to the Board of Supervisors in June, 1990. Can I use my re-election funds to pay for this trip? This is the determination for which I write to you.

I've called the office previous to this but did not hear back from anyone. Now I write to you because I must inform the group whether or not I intend to join them. Please let me know as soon as possible on this. I realize you have a 21 day time frame, but respectfully ask that you make a determination on this sooner.

I appreciate your cooperation.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Anna G. Eshoo

Enclosures
